svg.aria-label: NebulaCR enterprise architecture: data plane, control plane, observability and AI agent
svg.title: NebulaCR Enterprise Architecture
svg.desc: A single mapped diagram of NebulaCR end-to-end: how a `docker push` flows through the registry, scanner, GC refcount writer, lazy-pull indexer and lineage detector; where Grafana, Prometheus and the Postgres-backed cost / CVE / GC tables sit; how the AI agent (nebula-pilot), import runner, attestations and rebuild emitters plug in. Solid arrows = synchronous request paths; dashed arrows = asynchronous fire-and-forget; dotted = read-only telemetry.
svg.text: Data plane (push / pull) • Async pipelines (scan, GC, lazy-pull, lineage, rebuild) • Postgres-backed state • Observability • AI agent

g.text: OSV · NVD · GHSA ingest · Ollama AI

svg.text: Diagram corresponds to docs/design/009–019. Each Postgres-backed feature ships behind a NEBULACR_*__ENABLED kill-switch (default off); Grafana picks up dashboards via the `grafana_dashboard: "1"` ConfigMap label.
